title: augustinea major
intro: Augustinea major, also known as greater angelica, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Augustinea major include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Augustinea major can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, flu, and other infections.
